privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/notification-system. The extracted superclass must be named 'AbstractNotificationService'. Exactly 3 fields (serviceName, enabled, maxRetries) and 7 methods (isEnabled, setEnabled, getServiceName, getMaxRetries, setMaxRetries, validateRecipient, createFailureResult) must be extracted. Although the task description mentions '20+ existing unit tests', there are actually exactly 6 test methods in NotificationServiceTest. The VLM should look for 6/6 passing tests in the JUnit view.
